prompt: A stylized mystical underwater kingdom wearing a pocket watch
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork of a stylized, mystical underwater kingdom. The golden pocket watch from image 1 is a central and significant element, appearing as if the kingdom itself is 'wearing' it. The watch, shown open with its white face and etched inner lid as seen in image 1, should be prominently integrated into the kingdom's structure, perhaps as a large, iconic architectural feature or a magical, floating centerpiece.
objects: Open pocket watch with white face
Etched inner lid of the pocket watch
Pocket watch integrated as a large, iconic architectural feature
Central and significant placement of the watch within the kingdom
